subject: DASHBOARD-TABS-V1 ready for Suite 13
body: Implemented app/dashboard/page.tsx with Students, Progress, Rewards, and Account tabs, diagnostic badge on child cards, and ?tab= routing. Typecheck passed. Please add/update Suite 13 tests to verify tab navigation, default tab behavior, diagnostic badge state, and that existing PIN, rewards, and learning actions still work.

subject: codex/agents-foundation pushed
body: Dashboard tabs branch is now pushed to origin/codex/agents-foundation. Please pull that branch, verify the dashboard implementation, and write Suite 13 tests against the real code. master does not yet include the dashboard change.
